nodes.name: Microtarsus
nodes.summary: Microtarsus（Microtarsus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联7种鸟类，如Puff-backed bulbul、Yellow-wattled bulbul、Grey-headed bulbul等7种鸟类。

nodes.name: Black-and-white bulbul
nodes.summary: The black-and-white bulbul (Microtarsus melanoleucos) is a species of songbird in the bulbul family, Pycnonotidae. It is found on the Malay Peninsula, Sumatra, and Borneo. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest and subtropical or tropical moist montane forest. It is threatened by habitat loss. References
